notes.text: New GalleryGrid API: props become { photos: Photo[] } only (drop columns). Render a responsive grid using Tailwind classes grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 (2 mobile/3 tablet/4 desktop) with inline style gap clamp(6px,0.8vw,12px). Each tile: inline aspectRatio '3 / 4', overflow hidden, cursor pointer; img width/height 100% object-fit cover. Lightbox block unchanged.

Photo type consolidation: delete galleryColumns.ts and import Photo from GalleryGrid in both pages (GalleryGrid already exports Photo). Remove the now-dead forcedRatio field from the Photo type and all usages.

Project convention: heavy inline styles plus Tailwind utility classes (e.g. className 'hidden md:flex'). Use Tailwind only for the responsive column count (needs media queries); keep everything else inline to match existing style. Font via var(--font-bricolage); pages are black bg/white text.

Bash/grep is hook-blocked in this Claude Code planning session, so I could not confirm via grep that nothing besides foodphotography/page.tsx imports galleryColumns. Must verify at build time before deleting the module.

payload.context: Plan: concrete implementation decisions for the uniform 3:4 grid refactor.
